- [Query](#query)
- [Scan](#scan)
- [Update Item](#updateItem)
- [Update Table](#updateTable)

### Batch Delete Item

`<dynamodb:batch-delete-item>`

The Batch Delete Item operation deletes multiple items in one or more tables.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_BatchWriteItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Request Delete Items</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more items to delete from the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BatchWriteItemResult">Batch Write Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Batch Get Item

`<dynamodb:batch-get-item>`

The Batch Get Item operation returns the attributes of one or more items from one or more tables.
You identify requested items by primary key.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_BatchGetItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Request Items</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A map of one or more table names and, for each table, a map that describes one or more items to retrieve from that table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Consumed Capacity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INDEXES</p></li><li><p>TOTAL</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the level of detail about provisioned throughput consumption that is returned in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BatchGetItemResult">Batch Get Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Batch Put Item

`<dynamodb:batch-put-item>`

The Batch Put Item operation puts multiple items in one or more tables.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_BatchWriteItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Request Put Items</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more items to insert into table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#BatchWriteItemResult">Batch Write Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Create Table

`<dynamodb:create-table>`

The Create Table operation adds a new table to your account. In an AWS account, table names must be
unique within each region.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_CreateTable.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the table to create.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Definitions</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#AttributeDefinition">Attribute Definition</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An array of attributes that describe the key schema for the table and indexes.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Schemas</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#KeySchemaElement">Key Schema Element</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the attributes that make up the primary key for a table or an index.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Capacity Units</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of strongly consistent reads consumed per second before DynamoDB returns a ThrottlingException.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Capacity Units</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of writes consumed per second before DynamoDB returns a ThrottlingException.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Global Secondary Indexes</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GlobalSecondaryIndex">Global Secondary Index</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more global secondary indexes (the maximum is five) to be created on the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Local Secondary Indexes</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#LocalSecondaryIndex">Local Secondary Index</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more local secondary indexes (the maximum is five) to be created on the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Stream View Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NEW_IMAGE</p></li><li><p>OLD_IMAGE</p></li><li><p>NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES</p></li><li><p>KEYS_ONLY</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the information that a database stream captures and writes when you modify an item in the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Stream Enabled</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether to enable Streams (true) or disable Streams (false).</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#TableDescription">Table Description</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Delete Item

`<dynamodb:delete-item>`

This operation deletes a single item in a table by primary key.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Table name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Primarykey</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Primary key name and value map.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#DeleteItemResult">Delete Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Delete Table

`<dynamodb:delete-table>`

The Delete Table operation deletes a table and all of its items.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_DeleteTable.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the table to delete.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#TableDescription">Table Description</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Describe Table

`<dynamodb:describe-table>`

This operation returns information about the table, including the current status of the table, when
it was created, the primary key schema, and any indexes on the table.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeTable.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the table to describe.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#TableDescription">Table Description</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Get Item

`<dynamodb:get-item>`

The Get Item operation returns a set of attributes for the item with the given primary key.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_GetItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the table containing the requested item.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A map of attribute names to AttributeValue objects, representing the primary key of the item to retrieve.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes To Gets</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use ProjectionExpression instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Consistent Read</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the read consistency model: If set to true, then the operation uses strongly consistent reads; otherwise, the operation uses eventually consistent reads.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Expression Attribute Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression. The following are some use cases for using ExpressionAttributeNames:</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Projection Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that identifies one or more attributes to retrieve from the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Consumed Capacity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INDEXES</p></li><li><p>TOTAL</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the level of detail about provisioned throughput consumption returned in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>NONE</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#GetItemResult">Get Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### List Tables

`<dynamodb:list-tables>`

This operation returns an array of table names associated with the current account and endpoint.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_ListTables.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Exclusive Start Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The first table name that this operation will evaluate. Use the value that was returned for LastEvaluatedTableName in a previous operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Limit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A maximum number of table names to return. If this parameter is not specified, the limit is 100.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ListTablesResult">List Tables Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Paginated Query

`<dynamodb:paginated-query>`

The **Paginated query** operation finds items based on primary key values. You can query any table
or secondary index that has a composite primary key, a partition key, and a sort key. The operation
returns pages with a limit specified in the **Limit** field or the maximum amount of 1MB data. This
behavior differentiates from the existing **Query** operation that truncates the response ignoring
the DynamoDB value of the **Last Evaluated Key** field, which indicates that the query has more
matching items.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Condition Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The condition that specifies the key values for items to retrieve by the <strong>Query</strong> operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Conditions</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use <strong>Key Condition Expression</strong> instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Scan Index Forward</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the order for index traversal: If true (default), the traversal is performed in ascending order; if false, the traversal is performed in descending order.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Select</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ALL_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>COUNT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The attributes to return in the result.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more values to substitute in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the table containing the requested item.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes To Gets</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use the <strong>Projection Expression</strong> field instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Conditional Operator</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AND</p></li><li><p>OR</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A logical operator to apply to the conditions.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Consistent Read</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the read consistency model: If set to true, then the operation uses strongly consistent reads; otherwise, the operation uses eventually consistent reads.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Exclusive Start Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The primary key of the first item that this operation evaluates.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filter Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that contains conditions that DynamoDB applies after the operation, but before the data is returned to you. Items that do not satisfy the criteria are not returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Index Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a secondary index to scan. This index can be any local secondary index or global secondary index.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Limit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of items to evaluate (not necessarily the number of matching items).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Projection Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that identifies one or more attributes to retrieve from the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Condition Filter</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The condition that evaluates the query results after the items are read and returns only the desired values.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Consumed Capacity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INDEXES</p></li><li><p>TOTAL</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The level of detail of the provisioned throughput consumption returned in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Message of Array of Object payload and <a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a> attributes</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY

### Put Item

`<dynamodb:put-item>`

This operation creates a new item, or replaces an old item with a new item. If an item that has the
same primary key as the new item already exists in the specified table, the new item replaces the
existing item.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_PutItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Table name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Item</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Item to be inserted.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#PutItemResult">Put Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Query

`<dynamodb:query>`

The Query operation finds items based on primary key values. You can query any table or secondary
index that has a composite primary key (a partition key and a sort key).

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_Query.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Condition Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The condition that specifies the key values for items to be retrieved by the Query action.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Conditions</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use KeyConditionExpression instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Scan Index Forward</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Specifies the order for index traversal: If true (default), the traversal is performed in ascending order; if false, the traversal is performed in descending order.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Select</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ALL_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>COUNT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The attributes to be returned in the result.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more values to substitute in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the table containing the requested item.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes To Gets</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use the Projection Expression field instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Conditional Operator</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AND</p></li><li><p>OR</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A logical operator to apply to the conditions.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Consistent Read</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the read consistency model: If set to true, then the operation uses strongly consistent reads; otherwise, the operation uses eventually consistent reads.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Exclusive Start Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The primary key of the first item that this operation evaluates.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filter Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that contains conditions that DynamoDB applies after the operation, but before the data is returned to you. Items that do not satisfy the criteria are not returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Index Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a secondary index to scan. This index can be any local secondary index or global secondary index.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Limit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of items to evaluate (not necessarily the number of matching items).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Projection Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that identifies one or more attributes to retrieve from the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Condition Filter</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The condition that evaluates the query results after the items are read and returns only the desired values.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Consumed Capacity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INDEXES</p></li><li><p>TOTAL</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The level of detail of the provisioned throughput consumption returned in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#QueryResult">Query Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Scan

`<dynamodb:scan>`

The Scan operation returns one or more items and item attributes by accessing every item in a table
or secondary index. To have DynamoDB return fewer items, you can provide a Filter Expression
operation.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_Scan.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Segment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>For a parallel Scan request, Segment identifies an individual segment to be scanned by an application worker.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Select</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ALL_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>ALL_PROJECTED_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>SPECIFIC_ATTRIBUTES</p></li><li><p>COUNT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The attributes to be returned in the result.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Total Segments</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>For a parallel Scan request, TotalSegments represents the total number of segments into which the Scan operation is divided.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more values to substitute in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the table containing the requested item.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attributes To Gets</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy field. Use the Projection Expression field instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Conditional Operator</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AND</p></li><li><p>OR</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A logical operator to apply to the conditions.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Consistent Read</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the read consistency model: If set to true, then the operation uses strongly consistent reads; otherwise, the operation uses eventually consistent reads.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Exclusive Start Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The primary key of the first item that this operation evaluates.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Filter Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that contains conditions that DynamoDB applies after the operation, but before the data is returned to you. Items that do not satisfy the criteria are not returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Index Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a secondary index to scan. This index can be any local secondary index or global secondary index.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Limit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of items to evaluate (not necessarily the number of matching items).</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Projection Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A string that identifies one or more attributes to retrieve from the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Condition Filter</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The condition that evaluates the query results after the items are read and returns only the desired values.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Consumed Capacity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INDEXES</p></li><li><p>TOTAL</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The level of detail of the provisioned throughput consumption returned in the response..</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#ScanResult">Scan Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Update Item

`<dynamodb:update-item>`

This operation edits an existing itemâs attributes, or adds a new item to the table if it does not
already exist.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_UpdateItem.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Table name.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Primary key.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Consumed Capacity</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>INDEXES</p></li><li><p>TOTAL</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines the level of detail about provisioned throughput consumption that is returned in the response.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Item Collection Metrics</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>SIZE</p></li><li><p>NONE</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Determines whether item collection metrics are returned.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NONE</p></li><li><p>ALL_OLD</p></li><li><p>UPDATED_OLD</p></li><li><p>ALL_NEW</p></li><li><p>UPDATED_NEW</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Use if you want to get the item attributes as they appear before or after they are updated.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Update Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression that defines one or more attributes to be updated, the action to be performed on them, and new value(s) for them.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Updates</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use updateExpression instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Expected</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>This is a legacy parameter. Use conditionExpression instead.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Conditional Operator</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>AND</p></li><li><p>OR</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A logical operator to apply to the conditions.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Condition Expression</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Names</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Values</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Object</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more values to substitute in an expression.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#UpdateItemResult">Update Item Result</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Update Table

`<dynamodb:update-table>`

This operation modifies the provisioned throughput settings, global secondary indexes, or DynamoDB
Streams settings for a given table.

For information, see the
[Amazon DynamoDB API Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/APIReference/API_UpdateTable.html)
for this operation.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Table Name</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the table to update.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Attribute Definitions</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#AttributeDefinition">Attribute Definition</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An array of attributes that describe the key schema for the table and indexes. If you are adding a new global secondary index to the table, AttributeDefinitions must include the key elements of the new index.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Read Capacity Units</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of strongly consistent reads consumed per second before DynamoDB returns a ThrottlingException.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Write Capacity Units</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The maximum number of writes consumed per second before DynamoDB returns a ThrottlingException.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Global Secondary Index Updates</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#GlobalSecondaryIndexUpdate">Global Secondary Index Update</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An array of one or more global secondary indexes for the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Stream View Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NEW_IMAGE</p></li><li><p>OLD_IMAGE</p></li><li><p>NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES</p></li><li><p>KEYS_ONLY</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When an item in the table is modified, StreamViewType determines what information is written to the stream for this table.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Stream Enabled</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Indicates whether DynamoDB Streams is enabled (true) or disabled (false) on the table.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>false</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p><a href="#TableDescription">Table Description</a></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#RequestIDAttribute">Request ID Attribute</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Default Configuration](#config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:UNKNOWN
- DYNAMODB:UNRECOGNIZED_CLIENT_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:VALIDATION_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:AUTHORIZATION_NOT_FOUND

### Describe Stream

`<dynamodb:describe-stream>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Stream ARN</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [Streams Configuration](#streams-config)

#### Throws

- DYNAMODB:ACCESS_DENIED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONDITIONAL_CHECK_FAILED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:CONNECTIVITY
- DYNAMODB:INCOMPLETE_SIGNATURE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:ITEM_COLLECTION_SIZE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:LIMIT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:MISSING_AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:PROVISIONED_THROUGHPUT_EXCEEDED_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_IN_USE_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND_EXCEPTION
- DYNAMODB:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DYNAMODB:THROTTLING_EXCEPTION

### Get Records

`<dynamodb:get-records>`

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Configuration</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Shard Iterator</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A shard iterator that was retrieved from a previous <strong>Get Shard Iterator</strong> operation.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Streaming Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#repeatable-in-memory-iterable">Repeatable In Memory Iterable</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#repeatable-file-store-iterable">Repeatable File Store Iterable</a></p></li><li><p>non-repeatable-iterable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configure to use repeatable streams.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Variable</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The name of a variable to store the operationâs output.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target Value</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>#[payload]</code></p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnect-forever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
